## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows project style (`npm run lint` passes)
- [ ] Code is formatted (`npm run format:write`)
- [ ] All tests pass (`npm run all`)
- [ ] Bundle is updated (`npm run bundle`)
- [ ] Documentation updated if needed
- [ ] No new warnings introduced
